snippet.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios’ first-ever foray into the genre, “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

“Clayface” unravels one man’s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one’s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Tarzan: Live Action - (2026) | Chris Hemsworth, Amanda Seyfried | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Tarzan #ChrisHemsworth #ConceptTrailer

Watch This Tarzan Live Action Fan-Made Concept Trailer

What if the legendary king of the jungle swung back onto the big screen with Chris Hemsworth embodying the raw power and primal grace of Tarzan? This concept trailer reimagines the classic tale with breathtaking jungle landscapes, visceral action sequences, and a deeply emotional story of a man torn between two worlds. Amanda Seyfried brings new life to Jane Porter while Arnold Schwarzenegger commands the screen in a role that adds unexpected intensity to this wild adventure. Every scene was crafted to honor the timeless legacy while pushing the story into bold new territory.

The storyboard and all visuals in this trailer were personally created by me as a passionate "What If" project exploring a modern Tarzan adaptation. I envisioned Hemsworth channeling the untamed spirit of a man raised among apes, connecting with audiences through both heart and spectacle. From thundering elephant stampedes to intimate moments beneath the jungle canopy, this concept captures the adventure and wonder that made Tarzan an enduring icon. This is my personal love letter to one of fiction's greatest heroes and the incredible cast I dream could bring him to life.

Disclaimer: This is a fan-made concept trailer and a personal "What If" creative project. It is not affiliated with Edgar Rice Burroughs Inc., Warner Bros., Disney, or any official Tarzan production. All storyboard work and visuals were independently created by me for entertainment purposes only.

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.

snippet.title: Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER GEKITOU Trailer
snippet.description:
The SUPER Brawl between Goku and Beerus!
At the end, Frieza is seen awaiting his resurrection ――

Series Premieres in Fall of 2026!
The anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus in Fall 2026!

#dragonball #dragonballsuper

◾️Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER Launch Trailer
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OOmRInABehI

◾️INTRODUCTION
The globally beloved manga DRAGON BALL by Akira Toriyama continues to captivate fans through a wide range of media—from TV animation, movies, games, and merchandising—standing as a top-ranked title with extraordinary worldwide popularity. 
Now, in 2026, the anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus! This ENHANCED edition introduces a large volume of newly added and redrawn cuts, as well as a reconstructed narrative. With cutting-edge visual expression, the series delivers even more immersive battle scenes and a more faithful representation of the original manga—bringing an ENHANCED edition to life like never before.

Several years have passed since the fierce battle against Majin Buu, and Earth has finally regained a brief moment of peace. At the same time, Beerus, the God of Destruction, awakens from his long, deep sleep. Even Kai and Supreme Kai, aware of Beerus’s overwhelming power to destroy entire planets, watch his awakening with great fear… Meanwhile, Beerus hears rumors of a Saiyan who defeated Frieza—and suddenly appears before Goku.
Targeted by Beerus, the strongest being in the universe, Earth is in grave danger. Thus begins an Earth-shattering cosmic battle between the God of Destruction and Goku and his allies—a conflict that will shake the entire universe.

Original Work, Story & Character Design: Akira Toriyama
